table_description: Billing records — invoice amounts, payment status, and billing periods.
use_cases: Calculate collected revenue vs billed revenue
Identify failed payments and payment failure rate
Analyze payment timing (days between issued_at and paid_at)
data_quality_notes: paid_at is NULL for pending and failed invoices
Annual billing invoices have amount = mrr * 12 * 0.9 (10% annual discount)
period_start and period_end are DATE (not TIMESTAMP)
amount is in USD — currency column exists but all values are 'USD'

table_columns.name: status
table_columns.description: Payment status: paid, pending, failed, refunded

table_columns.name: paid_at
table_columns.description: When payment was received — NULL if not paid
